reasoning: The document exhibits significant structural and visual defects, most notably the duplication of the entire resolution text (once as HTML and once as a full-page image) and the transformation of a standard signature block into a fabricated table with redundant data. While the content itself appears accurate, the low structural score (0.545) and the identification of three major fidelity concerns make auto-approval a high risk for publication.

concerns.analysis: The names 'Mark F. Richardson' and 'Susan O. Washburn' are duplicated within the signature table (element index 10). In the source document, each name appears only once within the text block under the signature line. In the output table, the names are repeated in both the 'Field' and 'Value' columns for each signature row.
concerns.source_pdf_quote:
MARK F. RICHARDSON, CHAIRMAN
SUSAN O. WASHBURN
CLERK TO THE BOARD
concerns.output_quote:
Row 2: "MARK F. RICHARDSON, CHAIRMAN", "Mark F. Richardson"
Row 3: "SUSAN O. WASHBURN\nCLERK TO THE BOARD", "Susan O. Washburn"
concerns.location: Board of Commissioners Signatures table, element index 10

concerns.analysis: The signature block at the bottom of the document has been converted into a table structure. The source document contains standard signature lines with text beneath them, not a table. Additionally, the output table contains fabricated headers ('Field' and 'Value') that are not present in the original document.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The signature section at the bottom of the page consists of two separate blocks with horizontal lines for physical signatures and printed text below them.
concerns.output_quote: A table at element index 10 with headers 'Field' and 'Value' and two data rows representing the signature blocks.
concerns.location: Board of Commissioners Signatures table, element index 10

concerns.analysis: The entire body content of the resolution is visually duplicated on the page. The resolution text (WHEREAS clauses, etc.) and signature names are first rendered as HTML text and a table, and then the exact same content is repeated as a full-page embedded image of the original PDF document. This results in identical paragraphs and signature information appearing twice within the body of the output.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The resolution text starting from "WHEREAS, in September of 2021..." and ending with the signature names.
concerns.output_quote: The text is present first as reconstructed HTML text (immediately following the title) and then duplicated as part of the embedded image of the document at the bottom of the page.

action_items: Remove the duplicate full-page embedded image following the text.
Reformat the signature block to remove the table structure and fabricated headers.
Deduplicate the names in the signature section to match the original document layout.
